reply_original: Glad you're enjoying Fantasia! We're constantly working to make the experience even better than "ok" for you. If you have any specific ideas or features you'd like to see, feel free to share them at support@fantachat.ai. Your feedback helps us grow. Have fun chatting with your favorite characters!
reply_zh: 很高兴你喜欢 Fantasia！我们一直在努力为你提供超越“还可以”的更佳体验。如果你有任何具体的想法或想要看到的功能，欢迎随时通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们分享。你的反馈能帮助我们成长。祝你与心仪的角色聊得开心！
